basic_details.job_title: ICSI Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 24 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) has officially released a recruitment notification for Young Professional. For all details regarding the recruitment process, eligibility, and application procedure, refer to the official notification. Eligible candidates can download it from the link below.

important_dates.raw: Starting Date for Apply Online: 08-06-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: 14-06-2026

age_limit.details: Maximum Age limit: 40 Years Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

all_official_links.label: ICSI Young Professional Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ICSI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for ICSI Recruitment 2026 is 14 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available under ICSI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 24 vacancies have been announced, including 6 Young Professional posts and 18 Assistant Young Professional posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the qualification required for the Young Professional post?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the Young Professional post must be a Member of The Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) and should possess one year of post-qualification work experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility criteria for the Assistant Young Professional post?
faq.answer: Applicants must have passed the ICSI Intermediate/Executive Examination. Freshers with excellent communication, analytical, and interpersonal skills are also eligible to apply.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for ICSI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 40 years as on 01 June 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What salary is offered under ICSI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive Rs. 75,000 per month for the Young Professional post and Rs. 40,000 per month for the Assistant Young Professional post.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for ICSI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No. The official notification does not mention any application fee for applying to these posts.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for ICSI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must submit their applications through the online mode only before the closing date.
